positive: A symmetrical, sophisticated illustration featuring a crescent moon nestled among stylized mountain peaks at twilight. The art must be rendered in a detailed, clean vector art style, mimicking mid-century modern lithographs or celestial diagrams. Use a highly contrasting, limited color palette of deep midnight blue, muted gold, and cream white. Emphasize strong silhouettes and intricate linework. Incorporate swirling, stylized nebulae patterns and geometric stardust motifs to fill the negative space. The composition must be perfectly centered and optimized for clean, high-contrast screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, noisy, low detail, artifacts, watermark, text, signatures, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, fuzzy, gradient wash, photorealistic, muddy colors
